name: long-running
description: Harness for AI Agents working across context windows — supports multi-session continuity with feature tracking, progress logging, model assignment & review system, Verification Pipeline (7 checks beyond build success), incremental development pattern, design doc impact check on /add-feature & /edit-feature (auto-detect entity/API/diagram impact + interactive sync prompt), and integration with ui-mockup, system-design-doc, dotnet-dev skills
